ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Galarian Mr. Mime via card name, PokemonTCG.io API (swsh2-37, National Pokedex no. 122, Ice/Psychic, evolves to Mr. Rime), artist kirisAki, and canonical blue tap-dancer-on-ice design.

trivia_bullets.text: Two corpus Galarian Mr. Mime prints: RBC-037 (kirisAki art, more full-body-extended dance pose, prominent ice surface, graphic-stylized style) vs. DAA-035 (Misa Tsutsui art, wave-22 IP-verified anchor, adjacent-collector to Mr. Rime evolution DAA-036). Both share identical printed flavor text verbatim.

Flavor text: 'Its talent is tap-dancing. It can also manipulate temperatures to create a floor of ice, which this Pokemon can kick up to use as a barrier.' Identical text on both corpus prints (RBC-037 and DAA-035).

Galarian Mr. Mime (Ice/Psychic) is a Galar regional variant of Kantonian Mr. Mime (Psychic/Fairy). The Galarian form evolves into Mr. Rime (also Galar-exclusive), giving it an evolutionary line the Kantonian form lacks. The Galar design concept maps British music-hall and tap-dance culture onto the original mime archetype.

related_cards.name: Galarian Mr. Mime
related_cards.note: alternate corpus print, Misa Tsutsui art, adjacent-collector to Mr. Rime
